locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Eventbrite location slugs, exactly as they appear in the URL. For https://www.eventbrite.com/d/india--mumbai/all-events/ the slug is india--mumbai

category.title: Category
category.description: Category slug from the Eventbrite URL, e.g. all-events, music, business, food-and-drink

startUrls.title: Start URLs (advanced)
startUrls.description: Paste full Eventbrite search URLs instead of locations. Pagination is handled for you.

maxItems.title: Max events
maxItems.description: Stop after this many events across all locations. You are charged per event returned.

maxPagesPerSearch.title: Max pages per location
maxPagesPerSearch.description: Safety limit. A big city can have 49+ pages, so this stops a run from getting expensive.
